# vox_lib

> A free, HELIX-native UI + utility library for HELIX (UE5) — a clean-room equivalent of the ox_lib `lib.*` contract that FiveM resources expect. Provides UI (notify, text UI, dialogs, menus, progress, skill check, radial), cinematic control (eased weather / sky-params / time + freecam), a character creator over HELIX's native cosmetics, entity spawning (vehicles / objects / peds + vehicle exit/warp/attach), animations (montages with eased blend), spatial helpers (raycast, worldToScreen, markers, points/zones, screen fade), and the foundation utilities — all on one global `lib` table.

vox_lib can be used three ways: as a standalone package, source-bundled into a consumer's own Lua state, or as an `exports` resource — `modules/zexports.lua` registers every `lib.*` as `exports.vox_lib:*` (yielding UI calls survive the boundary; as of 2026-07-07 HELIX also proxies metatable objects across it, with each proxied method call costing one RPC hop, so hot per-frame paths still prefer source-bundling). The deployable resource is the `vox_lib/` folder. For agent navigation + a module map, start with AGENTS.md.

## Documentation
- [README](https://github.com/GrizzyVV/vox_lib-HELIX-/blob/main/README.md): overview, install, quick start, component catalog
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/GrizzyVV/vox_lib-HELIX-/blob/main/AGENTS.md): codebase navigation + per-module map for agents
- [Developer reference](https://github.com/GrizzyVV/vox_lib-HELIX-/blob/main/docs/developer.md): the full `lib.*` API — every function, its options, and examples
- [How it works](https://github.com/GrizzyVV/vox_lib-HELIX-/blob/main/docs/tech.md): runtime model, the WebUI reverse channel, the scheduler, the cinematic + entity layers

## Source (the resource)
- [init.lua](https://github.com/GrizzyVV/vox_lib-HELIX-/blob/main/vox_lib/init.lua): creates the global `lib` table (loads first)
- [package.json](https://github.com/GrizzyVV/vox_lib-HELIX-/blob/main/vox_lib/package.json): the canonical module load order
- [modules/](https://github.com/GrizzyVV/vox_lib-HELIX-/tree/main/vox_lib/modules): one Lua file per capability; each attaches to `lib`
- [web/](https://github.com/GrizzyVV/vox_lib-HELIX-/tree/main/vox_lib/web): the WebUI pages for the visual components (shared theme in `web/_shared/helix-life.css`)

## Key concepts
- Load model: source-bundled, standalone, or exports resource; everything attaches to the global `lib`, and `modules/zexports.lua` re-exposes it as `exports.vox_lib:*` (one RPC hop per call; metatable objects proxy across the boundary as of 2026-07-07).
- WebUI reverse channel: Lua→page via `SendEvent` (`{name, args}` envelope), page→Lua via `hEvent(name, data)`.
- Return-value calls (`alertDialog`/`inputDialog`/`progressBar`/`skillCheck`) yield — call them from inside a thread.
- Load order: `init.lua` → `class.lua` → rest (see `vox_lib/package.json`).
